description_long: This is a single-story modern bungalow with a flat roof and a rectangular footprint, set on a circular patch of grass with paved walkways leading to the entrances. The front facade features a series of large glass windows and doors, framed by multiple columns supporting a covered porch area. The side and rear elevations are more minimal, with fewer windows and a simple, clean-lined appearance. The exterior walls are clad in light-colored horizontal siding, contrasting with the dark, flat roof. The porch area is furnished with outdoor seating, suggesting a space for relaxation or social gatherings. The overall design is streamlined and contemporary, emphasizing open views and outdoor connectivity.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large front windows, and a covered porch supported by columns. The exterior is light-colored with minimal side and rear windows, and paved walkways surround the structure.
description_view_0: Side view showing minimal windows and the clean, horizontal siding of the bungalow.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the large glass windows, multiple columns, and the covered porch area.
description_view_2: Rear corner view showing a secondary entrance, outdoor seating, and additional windows.
description_view_3: Back view with a single door and minimal window openings, emphasizing the simplicity of the rear facade.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped front windows
